### Problem Description
patched placeholder

### Your Incorrect Code
```cpp
#include <vector>
#include <iostream>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>
#include <string>
#include <numeric>

using namespace std;

#define INF (long long)1e1+8

int main(){
    int n;
    long long dp0, dp1, x, temp;
    dp0 = 0;
    dp1 = -INF;
    cin >> n;

    for ( int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        cin >> x;
        temp = dp0;
        dp0 = max( dp1 + 2*x, dp0);
        dp1 = max (temp+ x, dp1);
    }

    cout << max( dp0,dp1) << endl;
    return 0;
}
```

Error Analysis: Line 1: Got '200000000099998', Expected '199999000099999'

### Your Task
Fix the C++ code to pass ALL test cases (including hidden ones).

### Critical Guidelines
1. Focus on algorithmic correctness - NO hard-coded values or special cases
2. Ensure proper data structures and complexity (aim for O(N log N) or better when possible)
3. Handle edge cases (empty input, single elements, max constraints)
4. Use standard C++20 features; avoid non-portable code

### Output Format
Provide ONLY the complete fixed C++ code in a single ```cpp block.
